---
title: "Báo cáo PAKH tồn chưa đóng"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
css: styles.css
date: '`r format(Sys.Date(), "%d/%m/%Y")`'
---

<style type="text/css">
  body{
  font-size: 13pt;
  font-family: Serif
}
</style>

<style type="text/css">
.main-container {
  max-width: 80% !important;
  margin: auto;
}
</style>

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE}
#library(plyr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(repr)
library(dplyr)
library(DT)
library(highcharter)
library(readxl)
library(shiny)
#library(shinydashboard)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(formattable)
library(scales)
library(crosstalk)
library(reactable)
library(stringi)
#library(rgdal)
library(ggthemes)
library(ggiraph)
library(googlesheets4)
library(shinydashboard)
library(shinyWidgets)

writeLines(
  paste0('{"buildTime": "', format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"), '"}'),
  "last-build.json"
)
```


```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE}
pakh_ton <- read_excel("data/3.R_pakh.xlsx")
now <- format(
  as.POSIXct(Sys.time(), tz = "Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh"), 
  "%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S"
)
```

## <span style="color: #C35817;font-family: cambria;">**I. DANH SÁCH TICKET CÒN TỒN CHƯA XỬ LÝ ĐẾN ** <strong>`r now`</strong></span>
### <span style="color: #C35817;font-family: cambria;">**1. Tổng quan**</span>

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE}
pakh_ton %>%
  group_by(giai_doan, linh_vuc, he_thong, phong_dieuhanh) %>%
  summarise(tong = n(),
            trong_han = sum(!is.na(ma_HD) & trang_thai == "Trong hạn", na.rm = TRUE),
            sap_qua_han = sum(!is.na(ma_HD) & trang_thai == "Sắp quá hạn", na.rm = TRUE),
            qua_han = sum(!is.na(ma_HD) & trang_thai == "Quá hạn", na.rm = TRUE)) -> pakh_ton_bc

pakh_ton_bc <- pakh_ton_bc %>%
  arrange(phong_dieuhanh, desc(giai_doan))
```

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE}
kq1x <- unlist(pakh_ton_bc[1])
kq2x <- unlist(pakh_ton_bc[2])
kq3x <- unlist(pakh_ton_bc[3])
kq4x <- unlist(pakh_ton_bc[4])
kq5x <- accounting(unlist(pakh_ton_bc[c(1:nrow(pakh_ton_bc)),5]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq6x <- accounting(unlist(pakh_ton_bc[c(1:nrow(pakh_ton_bc)),6]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq7x <- accounting(unlist(pakh_ton_bc[c(1:nrow(pakh_ton_bc)),7]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq8x <- accounting(unlist(pakh_ton_bc[c(1:nrow(pakh_ton_bc)),8]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")


pakh_ton_bc_tb <- data.frame(kq1x,kq2x, kq3x, kq4x,kq5x,kq6x,kq7x,kq8x)
pakh_ton_bc_tb[5:8] <- lapply(pakh_ton_bc_tb[5:8], as.numeric)
rownames(pakh_ton_bc_tb) <- NULL
```

```{r,out.width = '150%', echo = FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(crosstalk)
library(reactable)
shared_pakh_ton_bc_tb <- SharedData$new(pakh_ton_bc_tb)

shiny::fluidRow(
  shiny::column(
    9,
    reactable(shared_pakh_ton_bc_tb, minRows = 3,width = 800, height = "auto", pagination = FALSE,
  resizable = TRUE,
  wrap = TRUE,
  searchable = TRUE,
  bordered = TRUE, highlight = TRUE, style = list(fontSize = "16px"),
  theme = reactableTheme(
  headerStyle = list(background = "#F56222"),
  rowStyle = list(
    `&:hover` = list(
      backgroundColor = "#FFE4CC !important",
      cursor = "pointer"
    )
  )
),
  defaultColDef = colDef(
    #headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#F5DEB3", whiteSpace = "normal",textAlign = "center"),
    footerStyle = list(fontWeight = "bold", color = "#B22222")
  ),
  striped = FALSE,
  columns = list(
    
    kq1x = colDef(name = "Giai đoạn", headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#F5DEB3", whiteSpace = "normal",textAlign = "center"),
      aggregate = "unique",
     align = "left", width = 100, footer = "Tổng"),
    
    kq2x = colDef(name = "Lĩnh vực", headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#F5DEB3", whiteSpace = "normal",textAlign = "center"),
      aggregate = "unique",
     align = "left", width = 100, footer = "Tổng"),
    
    kq3x = colDef(name = "Hệ thống", headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#F5DEB3", whiteSpace = "normal",textAlign = "center"),
      aggregate = "unique",
     align = "left", width = 100, footer = "Tổng"),
    
    kq4x = colDef(name = "Đơn vị phụ trách", headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#F5DEB3", whiteSpace = "normal",textAlign = "center"),
      aggregate = "unique",
     align = "left", width = 120, footer = "Tổng"),
    
    kq5x = colDef(name = "Tổng đơn tồn", headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#C8E2B1", whiteSpace = "normal",textAlign = "center"),
      aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 90, footer = function(values) sprintf("%.0f", sum(values))),
    
    
    kq6x = colDef(name = "Trong hạn", headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#BFCAE6", whiteSpace = "normal",textAlign = "center"),
      aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 90, footer = function(values) sprintf("%.0f", sum(values))),
    
    kq7x = colDef(name = "Sắp quá hạn", headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#BFCAE6", whiteSpace = "normal",textAlign = "center"),
      aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 100, format = colFormat(digits = 0, separators = TRUE), footer = function(values) sprintf("%s", format(sum(values), big.mark = ",", digits = 2L))),
    
    kq8x = colDef(
  name        = "Quá hạn",
  headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#BFCAE6",
                     whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
  aggregate   = "sum",
  align       = "right",
  width       = 100,
  format      = colFormat(digits = 0, separators = TRUE),
  footer      = function(values) sprintf("%s", format(sum(values), big.mark = ",", digits = 2L)),
  
  # ✅ Thêm vào đây
  style = function(value) {
    if (!is.na(value) && value > 0) {
      list(
        color           = "#B22222",      # Chữ đỏ đậm
        fontWeight      = "bold",
        backgroundColor = "#FFE4E1"       # Nền đỏ nhạt
      )
    }
  }
)

  )
)))
```

### <span style="color: #C35817;font-family: cambria;">**2. Danh sách chi tiết**</span>

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE}
ticket_chitiet <- pakh_ton[c(2,3,4,5,6,10:12,15:20,22:24,27:29)]
n1 <- c("Mã tỉnh", "Lĩnh vực", "Ngành hàng", "Sản phẩm", "Mã HĐ", "Tên khách hàng", "SĐT", "Địa chỉ", "Giai đoạn", "Nhóm sự cố", "Loại sự cố", "Chi tiết", "Ngày bắt đầu", "Ngày kết thúc", "Trạng thái", "Tên nhân viên", "Mã nhân viên", "Hệ thống", "Đơn vị điều hành", "AM chuyên quản")
colnames(ticket_chitiet) <- n1
ticket_chitiet[] <- lapply(ticket_chitiet, unlist)
```


```{r,out.width = '150%', echo = FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(reactable)
library(crosstalk)
library(htmltools)
library(jsonlite)

CT_GROUP    <- "bang_chitiet_group"
shared_data <- SharedData$new(ticket_chitiet, group = CT_GROUP)

data_json      <- toJSON(ticket_chitiet, auto_unbox = TRUE, na = "null")
col_names_json <- toJSON(names(ticket_chitiet), auto_unbox = FALSE)

custom_width <- c(
  "Sản phẩm"      = 150,
  "Chi tiết"       = 300,
  "Tên khách hàng" = 120,
  "Địa chỉ"        = 250
)
col_widths_r <- sapply(names(ticket_chitiet), function(col) {
  if (col %in% names(custom_width)) custom_width[[col]] else 100
})
col_widths_json <- toJSON(as.list(col_widths_r), auto_unbox = TRUE)

# ── Filters ──
filters <- div(
  style = "display: flex; gap: 20px; align-items: flex-end; margin-bottom: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap;",
  div(
    style = "width: 250px;",
    tags$label("Đơn vị điều hành", style = "font-weight: bold; display: block;"),
    filter_select("don_vi_dieu_hanh", "", shared_data, ~`Đơn vị điều hành`, multiple = FALSE)
  ),
  div(
    style = "width: 250px;",
    tags$label("Trạng thái", style = "font-weight: bold; display: block;"),
    filter_select("trang_thai", "", shared_data, ~`Trạng thái`, multiple = FALSE)
  ),
  div(
    style = "margin-top: 20px;",
    tags$button("🔄 Reset",
      style   = "padding: 6px 14px; cursor: pointer; border: 1px solid #ccc;
                 border-radius: 4px; background: #f5f5f5; font-size: 14px;",
      onclick = "document.querySelectorAll('.selectized').forEach(function(el){
                   if(el.selectize) el.selectize.clear();
                 });"
    )
  ),
  div(
    style = "margin-top: 20px;",
    tags$button("⬇ Tải Excel",
      style   = "padding: 6px 14px; cursor: pointer; border: 1px solid #28a745;
                 border-radius: 4px; background: #28a745; color: white; font-size: 14px;",
      onclick = "window._taiExcel && window._taiExcel(this)"
    )
  ),
  div(
    style = "margin-top: 20px;",
    tags$button("📷 Tải PNG",
      style   = "padding: 6px 14px; cursor: pointer; border: 1px solid #007bff;
                 border-radius: 4px; background: #007bff; color: white; font-size: 14px;",
      onclick = "window._taiPNG && window._taiPNG(this)"
    )
  )
)

# ── colDef ──
col_defs <- setNames(
  lapply(names(ticket_chitiet), function(col) {
    colDef(
      name        = col,
      headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#F5DEB3",
                         whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
      aggregate   = "unique",
      align       = "left",
      width       = col_widths_r[[col]]
    )
  }),
  names(ticket_chitiet)
)

# ── JavaScript: dùng paste0 thay sprintf để tránh lỗi % ──
js_vars <- paste0(
  "var FULL_DATA  = ", data_json, ";\n",
  "var COL_NAMES  = ", col_names_json, ";\n",
  "var COL_WIDTHS = ", col_widths_json, ";\n",
  "var CT_GROUP   = '", CT_GROUP, "';\n"
)

js_logic <- "
(function () {

  var activeKeys = null;

  function initFilter() {
    if (typeof crosstalk === 'undefined') { setTimeout(initFilter, 150); return; }
    var fh = new crosstalk.FilterHandle(CT_GROUP);
    fh.on('change', function (e) {
      activeKeys = (e.value && e.value.length > 0) ? e.value : null;
    });
  }
  initFilter();

  function getFilteredData() {
    if (!activeKeys) return FULL_DATA;
    var keySet = new Set(activeKeys.map(String));
    return FULL_DATA.filter(function (_, i) {
      return keySet.has(String(i + 1));
    });
  }

  function loadScript(url, cb) {
    if (document.querySelector('script[src=\"' + url + '\"]')) { cb && cb(); return; }
    var s = document.createElement('script');
    s.src = url;
    s.onload = cb || function () {};
    s.onerror = function () { alert('Không load được: ' + url); };
    document.head.appendChild(s);
  }

  function setBtnState(btn, loading, label) {
    if (!btn) return;
    btn.disabled    = loading;
    btn.textContent = loading ? '⏳ Đang tạo...' : label;
  }

  /* ── EXCEL ── */
  window._taiExcel = function (btn) {
    function doExcel() {
      setBtnState(btn, true);
      var rows = getFilteredData();
      if (!rows.length) {
        alert('Không có dữ liệu để xuất!');
        setBtnState(btn, false, '⬇ Tải Excel');
        return;
      }
      var ws = XLSX.utils.json_to_sheet(rows, { header: COL_NAMES });
      ws['!cols'] = COL_NAMES.map(function (col) {
        return { wch: Math.max(Math.round((COL_WIDTHS[col] || 100) / 7), 8) };
      });
      var wb = XLSX.utils.book_new();
      XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(wb, ws, 'Danh sach ticket');
      XLSX.writeFile(wb, 'danh_sach_ticket.xlsx');
      setBtnState(btn, false, '⬇ Tải Excel');
    }
    window.XLSX
      ? doExcel()
      : loadScript('https://cdn.sheetjs.com/xlsx-0.20.3/package/dist/xlsx.full.min.js', doExcel);
  };

  /* ── PNG ── */
  window._taiPNG = function (btn) {
    function doPNG() {
      setBtnState(btn, true);
      var rows = getFilteredData();
      if (!rows.length) {
        alert('Không có dữ liệu để xuất!');
        setBtnState(btn, false, '📷 Tải PNG');
        return;
      }

      var totalWidth = COL_NAMES.reduce(function (s, col) {
        return s + (COL_WIDTHS[col] || 100);
      }, 0);

      var html = '<table style=\"border-collapse:collapse;font-size:13px;'
               + 'font-family:Arial,sans-serif;width:' + totalWidth + 'px;\">'
               + '<colgroup>';
      COL_NAMES.forEach(function (col) {
        html += '<col style=\"width:' + (COL_WIDTHS[col] || 100) + 'px\">';
      });
      html += '</colgroup><thead><tr>';
      COL_NAMES.forEach(function (col) {
        html += '<th style=\"background:#F5DEB3;border:1px solid #ccc;'
             +  'padding:6px 8px;text-align:center;white-space:normal;'
             +  'word-break:break-word;\">' + col + '</th>';
      });
      html += '</tr></thead><tbody>';
      rows.forEach(function (row, idx) {
        var bg = idx % 2 === 0 ? '#ffffff' : '#f5f5f5';
        html += '<tr style=\"background:' + bg + '\">';
        COL_NAMES.forEach(function (col) {
          var txt = (row[col] === null || row[col] === undefined) ? '' : String(row[col]);
          html += '<td style=\"border:1px solid #ccc;padding:5px 8px;'
               +  'white-space:normal;word-break:break-word;'
               +  'vertical-align:top;\">' + txt + '</td>';
        });
        html += '</tr>';
      });
      html += '</tbody></table>';

      var wrapper = document.createElement('div');
      wrapper.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:-99999px;left:-99999px;'
                            + 'background:#ffffff;padding:16px;'
                            + 'width:' + (totalWidth + 32) + 'px;';
      wrapper.innerHTML = html;
      document.body.appendChild(wrapper);

      html2canvas(wrapper, {
        scale: 2,
        backgroundColor: '#ffffff',
        useCORS: true,
        width: wrapper.scrollWidth,
        height: wrapper.scrollHeight
      }).then(function (canvas) {
        document.body.removeChild(wrapper);
        var a = document.createElement('a');
        a.download = 'danh_sach_ticket.png';
        a.href = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
        document.body.appendChild(a);
        a.click();
        document.body.removeChild(a);
        setBtnState(btn, false, '📷 Tải PNG');
      }).catch(function (e) {
        document.body.removeChild(wrapper);
        alert('Lỗi PNG: ' + e.message);
        setBtnState(btn, false, '📷 Tải PNG');
      });
    }
    window.html2canvas
      ? doPNG()
      : loadScript('https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/html2canvas/1.4.1/html2canvas.min.js', doPNG);
  };

})();
"

# ── Render ──
browsable(
  tagList(
    filters,
    reactable(
      shared_data, minRows = 3, width = 1500, height = "auto",
      elementId = "bang-chitiet",
      theme = reactableTheme(
        style    = list(fontSize = "13px"),
        rowStyle = list(`&:hover` = list(backgroundColor = "#FFE4CC !important",
                                        cursor = "pointer"))
      ),
      columns         = col_defs,
      bordered        = TRUE,
      striped         = TRUE,
      highlight       = TRUE,
      resizable       = TRUE,
      defaultPageSize = 5
    ),
    # Inject biến R vào JS riêng → tránh sprintf
    tags$script(HTML(js_vars)),
    tags$script(HTML(js_logic))
  )
)
```
